mapper.sql: informationId, infType, title, publishTime, infImgUrl, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into information (informationId, infType, title, publishTime, infImgUrl, createdDate, content) values (#{informationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{infType,jdbcType=BIT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{infImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into information
informationId,
infType,
title,
publishTime,
infImgUrl,
createdDate,
content,
#{informationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{infType,jdbcType=BIT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{infImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update information
infType = #{infType,jdbcType=BIT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publishTime = #{publishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
infImgUrl = #{infImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where informationId = #{informationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update information set infType = #{infType,jdbcType=BIT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publishTime = #{publishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, infImgUrl = #{infImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where informationId = #{informationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update information set infType = #{infType,jdbcType=BIT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publishTime = #{publishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, infImgUrl = #{infImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where informationId = #{informationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT informationId,infImgUrl FROM information WHERE imgType = #{infType}
SELECT informationId,title FROM information ORDER BY createdDate DESC
